name: ADVANCED DRAINAGE SYSTEMS, INC.
business: We are the leading manufacturer of innovative water management solutions in the stormwater and onsite wastewater industries. Our products include thermoplastic corrugated pipe, chambers, fittings, and allied products for stormwater and wastewater management. We sell to residential, non-residential, infrastructure, and agriculture markets through distributors and retailers.

exposures.sentence: Our innovative products are used across a broad range of end markets and applications, including residential, non-residential, infrastructure and agriculture applications.

tamClaims.claim: Stormwater industry including landscape irrigation is approximately $14 billion annually.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that the stormwater industry, including landscape irrigation, annually, is an approximately $14 billion industry.

tamClaims.claim: Combined addressable market opportunity is approximately $16 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: On a combined basis, we estimate that we have an addressable market opportunity of approximately $16 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 30% of new North American single-family homes utilize onsite wastewater systems.
tamClaims.sentence: approximately 30% of new North American single-family homes utilize onsite wastewater systems.
